scripts.build:apk: tauri android build --apk && APK=src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-universal-release.apk && mkdir -p release && cp "$APK" release/ && echo 'APK copiado a release/app-universal-release.apk'
scripts.build:deb: tauri build --bundles deb && mkdir -p release && cp src-tauri/target/release/bundle/deb/sistema-impresion_*_amd64.deb release/
